name: Xi Jinping
role: President of the People's Republic of China; General Secretary of the Communist Party of China; Chairman of the Central Military Commission
bio: Xi Jinping has led the Communist Party of China since 2012 and the Chinese state since 2013. He hosted Donald Trump's May 13-15, 2026 state visit in Beijing — the first state visit by a US president to China in nearly nine years — using the bilateral to deliver his bluntest Taiwan warning to date while securing a 'constructive China-U.S. relationship of strategic stability' framework and commercial deliverables including a 200-jet Boeing order.

quotes.text: The Taiwan question is the most important issue in China-U.S. relations. If it is handled properly, the bilateral relationship will enjoy overall stability. Otherwise, the two countries will have clashes and even conflicts, putting the entire relationship in great jeopardy.
quotes.source: Chinese Foreign Ministry readout / NPR / Al Jazeera
